_doc: Cross-device read state for the Maddy video board (single source of truth). Served same-origin from daily-system Pages at maddy-plan-videos.html so the board reads identical status on desktop, phone, and iPad. Claude maintains this file. Full read-write cross-device sync goes live when the staged Supabase backend in ./backend is deployed.

C1.hook: What happens to her when I'm gone?

C2.hook: She could fly across the world alone. She couldn't start the dishes.
C2.note: live (batch01 Video 2); consent debt: log JER-384

C3.hook: I kept reminding her. That's exactly why she couldn't do it.

C4.hook: I called my kid lazy for years. I was wrong.

U1.hook: Your to-do list was built for a brain you don't have.

U2.hook: Just start is asking me to override my neurology with vibes.

U3.hook: A shower has eleven steps and my brain saw all of them at once.

U4.hook: 37 unread. I close it. And feel it all day.

U5.hook: It's not a character flaw. It's a support problem.

S1.hook: Did you do it yet is the most damaging text you can send.

S2.hook: Stop asking if they did it. Say this instead.

P1.hook: My friend sat on my couch, didn't help, and suddenly I could work.

P2.hook: The best ADHD hack no one prescribed. Your friend can't sit there every day.

MC2.hook: She asked to see one thing, not twelve.

MC3.hook: She asked for a way to say I can't right now without it counting against her.

C5.hook: He said yes with the homework right there, blank.

U6.hook: I say yeah I did it before my brain catches up.
